teachers.name: Huanglong Huinan
teachers.notes: Editorial bridge for Eisai's Huanglong lineage when the direct teacher Xuan Huaichang is not yet in the canonical corpus.

teachers.name: Yasutani Hakuun
teachers.notes: ZCLA's founder history notes that Maezumi had begun koan practice with Yasutani Roshi; this secondary edge keeps the public graph connected without overriding his family Soto roots.

teachers.name: Shunryu Suzuki
teachers.notes: Katagiri's Minnesota Zen Center biography records that he assisted Shunryu Suzuki at San Francisco Zen Center before founding his own community in Minnesota.

teachers.name: Shunryu Suzuki
teachers.notes: Kobun's biography identifies Shunryu Suzuki as the decisive later influence who brought him to Tassajara in 1967.
